headline: PROVE YOUR RECALL READINESS
subheading: Trace every batch to every consignee in hours, and pass MHRA scrutiny with confidence.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial visualisation of pharmaceutical recall traceability and batch reconciliation: a luminous network of interconnected nodes and flowing lines radiating outward from a single glowing origin point across a clean grid, evoking a batch traced through a distribution supply chain to every consignee; rows of softly abstracted sealed vial silhouettes and stacked cartons recede into shallow depth of field, with one carton subtly highlighted and set apart to suggest controlled quarantine and segregation; faint concentric rings ripple outward like a timed alert reaching the network, conveying speed and 24-hour readiness; deep navy background with elegant teal and cyan light trails, a subtle emerald-green status accent glowing on one node, fine clinical line-work and delicate data-flow particles; calm, premium clinical-luxury atmosphere, polished and authoritative, soft volumetric light from the upper left, shallow depth of field, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
